hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -n "${CLAUDE_ENV_FILE:-}" ]; then printf "export PATH=\"%s/tools:\$PATH\"\n" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; fi; export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; V=$(jq -r .engines.node package.json); nvm install "${V%.x}"; nvm alias default "${V%.x}"; pnpm run dev:init'
